item.title: Fun stuff I like! Unrelated to my usual stuff! (Data use warning)
item.description:
Check your wifi. It's alllllll videos. Yeah so. None of this is new or novel but I love these videos, and wanted them all in one place. And then it's like...I have 39 of them so I'll keep an eye out for more. And then I hit 50 and said fuck it, make it public. People like them or they wouldn't show up periodically, and maybe the kinds of people who like the first few haven't seen the last few. Also I like those sweet internet points and maybe this scratch that itch. No dishonesty about my intentions.
Classic. Here's the source because I actually know it. https://youtu.be/U9t-slLl30E?si=I7ISlsjQV9syyR_v
Quack. Love the "THWAP" of the ice cream.
Hard to pick a last video. This is gonna be my day.
Ok. Hope yall enjoyed it. Can't think, have seaguls in my ears now. If you like stuff, just fucking enjoy it. Like, don't apologize for your niche hobbies and podcasts and books. Get your joy where you can, and don't be ashamed to tell people you like it and why! Here's the archive link. If you're new to my profile and posts, be warned they are not all clean like this. Most are NSFW. May your way be Green and Golden. https://imgur.com/a/vhx2cjG
item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: Boycotts Work! Target Feeling the Pain
item.description:
People always say What can I do, I'm just one person. My group of women have been boycotting Target for months after they removed their DEI policies. We are all the primary purchaser in the house, everything from food to where we go on vacation is influenced by us. You and you friends have the same power and control.
Also check out this awesome artwork @emeraldpixiedust7 created https://imgur.com/gallery/mQX6bds I'm thinking of getting shirts made, if anyone wants in let me know https://fortune.com/2025/04/01/target-dei-demise-boycott-foot-traffic-down-eighth-consecutive-week/
item.dc:creator: tallyhoho

item.title: Dumps of Unusual Size 40: Science, Part One
item.description:
I am the opposite of this. I've been through too may tornado events. Earthquakes may be bad and aftershocks are disturbing, but tornadoes make U-turns to go back for buildings they missed. Especially trailer parks. I remember several years ago when the first tornado I heard about in California and it of course hit a trailer park outside of West Sacramento.
This one is for the geologists out there. This picture is a real picture that has been cartoonified for examples of glacial features. Unfortunately, I haven't been able to find the cartoon example.

item.title: What Happened Today #63
item.description: Trump is consolidating power faster than he can spell DEI. From defying court orders to purging national security staff and threatening universities, the administration is rewriting the rules—and punishing anyone who resists. Even Wall Street and the country's biggest law firm flinched. They’re testing the limits. It’s up to us to show where the line is. Subscribe free at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist LINKS 1. https://www.cnbc.com/2025/04/03/stock-market-today-live-updates.html 2. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/gen-timothy-haugh-head-of-nsa-and-cyber-command-is-fired/ 3. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/apr/03/laura-loomer-trump-meeting 4. https://www.npr.org/2025/04/03/nx-s1-5351751/voting-executive-order-lawsuit 5. https://www.rockymounttelegram.com/news/national/measles-spreads-to-central-texas-5-states-have-active-outbreaks/article_df9a9f15-09d9-4cd6-a641-f2f5d1533b72.html 6. https://abcnews.go.com/Technology/wireStory/brown-university-half-billion-federal-funding-halted-trump-120471799 7. https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5231021-trump-supports-proxy-voting_parents/ 8. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/04/03/senate-confirmation-mehmet-oz-medicare-medicaid-00270913 9. https://defensescoop.com/2025/04/03/investigation-hegseth-signal-gate-dod-inspector-general/ 10. https://www.msn.com/en-ie/news/world/rally-and-court-hearing-set-for-maryland-man-mistakenly-deported-to-el-salvador-prison/ar-AA1CgJER 11. https://www.courthousenews.com/federal-judge-says-shell-block-trumps-11-billion-cuts-to-public-health-funding/ 12. https://apnews.com/article/dei-trump-school-discrimination-federal-funding-7d1025753b9bd924711ace4069fca399 13. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/rfk-jr-hhs-job-cuts-doge-mistakes/ 14. https://motorillustrated.com/volkswagen-will-indicate-import-tariff-as-separate-fee-on-window-stickers/151765/ 15. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/04/04/us/politics/radio-free-europe-funding-trump.html 16. https://www.thecrimson.com/article/2025/4/4/harvard-federal-funding-demands/ 17. https://www.cnn.com/2025/04/03/politics/boasberg-alien-enemies-act-deportation-flights-hearing/index.html 18. https://www.reuters.com/world/us/trump-administration-shutters-dc-foreign-policy-think-tank-wilson-center-2025-04-04/ 19. https://www.reuters.com/world/us/kirkland-ellis-talks-with-white-house-avoid-executive-order-wsj-reports-2025-04-03/ 20. https://federalnewsnetwork.com/hiring-retention/2025/04/irs-will-bring-fired-probationary-employees-back-to-work-by-mid-april/ 21. https://social.demcast.com/toolkit/handsoff-8d1c

item.title: Some more memes to battle the bots/spam
item.description:
Some of us are trying to procrastinate instead of work, damnit! So here are some stuff I sent my ex-"it's complicated" partner. All reposts, sorry.
(not sure if this is real or satire, but funny nevertheless.)
Hope you (continue to) have a good day. Feel free to share any advice for writer's block!

IT GOES DEEP
Elbow Deep in a Herse sounds like a rejected name for My Chemical Romance
It is very disgusting, they should kiss about it. Also you can tell the OG "Artist" was American because they imply Americans know more about European-ness than Europeans.
yeah :c
Honey I think you might be a little sapphic

item.title: Tsugite is a traditional Japanese joinery technique that seamlessly connects wood without nails, screws, or glue.
item.dc:creator: bohund

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1320 (bank of fear)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I also have a dinosaur on my shoulder currently.
The reason: Atlantic currents such as the Gulf Stream help keep Europe warmer than it should be for its latitude. When/as they start failing... it gets colder.
Tezcatlipoca lives for the drama.
Yeah. This. I assume any flirtatious action I offer is unwanted attention, and unwanted attention is harassment or can be construed as such... so I just don't bother anymore. On the bright side, I've also been able to basically end the yearning for a partner and am now almost completely apathetic about this. I don't care much anymore about finding a partner for the end of the world: I'm more interested in building up my support network of friends and allies for the probable collapse of the American state so we can live our lives and have a cozy catastrophe.
Hahaha if you've ever been in a heavily ethnic Orthodox or Catholic parish, you know how this is true
Oh this is brilliant.
This is one of the most esoteric memes I've ever seen and I love it.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "gruhp." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.

item.title: Rated R for Rrriot! 23
item.description:
Hey veryon!! i'm cuff, and here's some memes i've found, just for you! See if you can spot a theme!
Anger is the part of you that won't let you be mistreated.
Not that the system isn't, like, the most pressing thing to change right now.
I don't have two dogs inside, i got these two!!
Jolkien Tolkien back at it!!
Very pleased.
Want some more dank anarchemes? Here's the rest of the Rated R for Rrriots!! 22: https://imgur.com/gallery/LpEbTOb 21: https://imgur.com/gallery/VDERWFJ 20: https://imgur.com/gallery/jR3AWwv 19: https://imgur.com/gallery/ci9JBj2 18: https://imgur.com/gallery/sxkrkL8 Are you looking for a new queer server to chat in on Discord? Rated R for Rrriot! is a queer community that values social revolution, queer liberation, solidarity, DIY, gaming, groups where we can all feel safer, and—of course—dank memes. You will need to write a short introduction to get access to most of the channels in the server. We're restricted to 18+ years of age. You can find us on Disboard: https://disboard.org/server/1072508608169906260
item.dc:creator: CuffScout

item.title: This used to be a weight I couldn’t get off the floor
item.dc:creator: powermidget

item.title: It's hard to convey how much easier it is to get information now.
item.description: If you wanted a picture of something, you needed to look at an old magazine or book. To look in magazines that weren't out that day, you had to look in a book called the "Readers Guide to Periodical Literature". It was just a black and white, text only, list of magazine articles that had been published. It was ONLY A LIST OF THE TITLES of the articles. It was at best two weeks plus a few days in mailing time out of date. To read one of the listed articles , if your library didn't have the archived copy of the magazine, you had to go to a cabinet that contained something called microfiche which looked more or less like photo negatives and look at them through a microscope. The microfiche had very small pictures of the magazine pages printed in black on clear plastic. To get a copy, you had to pay money and wait. I don't remember how long. That's if things were going well. If not you just had to request that the library get a copy of the magazine from some other library, or blindly order a copy of the article (again for money) and hope it was relevant. Also, if you could get "a copy" of the magazine, it wouldn't be a new copy of old magazine, it would be a used, often worn, original print. The archive was available for magazines from around 1900 to 2009. And this young lady did a Star Wars cosplay that would be good today! She could have also tried to get a picture of the screen, with a film camera, but if you got caught, they would often toss you out and ban you from the theater!
